emotion.title: Emotional Voice
emotion.help: Choose whether the agent's voice contains emotions

system.notSecureContext: WebRTC requires a secure context, please access via localhost or HTTPS

system.statement: Content generated by AI, for reference only

descriptions.voice: Users communicate with the intelligent assistant through voice.
descriptions.avatar: Interact with digital humans through video to enhance user experience authenticity.
descriptions.vision: Through video interaction, the agent provides feedback combining voice and visuals.
descriptions.video: Digital humans combine visual understanding for two-way video calls with users.
descriptions.chatbot: Directly communicate with the agent in chat dialog form through voice or text.
descriptions.pstnOut: The agent initiates outbound calls directly to the user's phone number through carrier lines.
descriptions.pstnIn: Users actively dial the agent for inbound calls through carrier lines.

agent.endedByInactivity: The call has ended due to prolonged inactivity
agent.voiceprintIgnored: (Voiceprint) Recognized as non-regular speaker, no response to your question
agent.aivadIgnored: (AIVad) Recognized as non-regular speaker, no response to your question

actions.clickToCall: Click to call, start the conversation

resume.title: Audio/Video Auto-play Failed
resume.content: Please click the 'Confirm' button to resume playback

latency.title: Latency
latency.tip: The delay from when the user finishes speaking the last word to when receiving the AI agent's first character response in a conversation turn. Note: There is a certain failure rate in conversation delay statistics. When there is irresistible dirty data, the system will automatically discard the conversation delay data.

interrupt.title: Intelligent Interruption
interrupt.help: Intelligently interrupt AI agent based on sound and environment

voiceprint.title: Voiceprint Recognition
voiceprint.help: AI only uses your voice as input, even if multiple people are speaking at the same time

voiceId.title: Select Voice
voiceId.help: After switching voices, AI will use the new voice in the next response

pushToTalk.spaceTip: Push-to-Talk mode is enabled, long press space to start speaking. Microphone is on by default in Push-to-Talk mode.

pushToTalk.tip: Press to start recording, release to stop
pushToTalk.spaceTip: Long press space to start speaking
pushToTalk.tooShort: Hold time too short, sending cancelled
pushToTalk.releaseToSendSwipeToCancel: Release to send, swipe up to cancel

status.speaking: I am replying, you can press the 'tab' key or speak to interrupt me
status.speakingNoInterrupt: I am replying, you can press the 'tab' key to interrupt me

mobile.speaking: I am replying, you can touch the screen or speak to interrupt me
mobile.speakingNoInterrupt: I am replying, you can touch the screen to interrupt me

error.localDeviceException: Call failed, local device error occurred

error.agentLeaveChannel: Call failed, the agent stopped the call
error.agentPullFailed: Call failed, agent stream pull failed
error.avatarRoutesExhausted: Digital human calls are busy, please try again later or enjoy AI audio call experience first.
error.subscriptionRequired: Connection failed, please check if your account has subscribed to the correct plan
error.agentNotFound: Connection failed, please check if the agent ID is correct

voiceprint.title: Voiceprint Feature Information
voiceprint.intro: Read a passage of text to let AI recognize your voice as input
voiceprint.instruction: Please read the following passage in a quiet environment
voiceprint.instructionText: "Wow, I think the dress you're wearing today is particularly bright, the style is very elegant, especially sets off your temperament, really too beautiful. Can you tell me which store bought such a beautiful dress, I also want to buy one."
voiceprint.duration: Recording duration: minimum 12 seconds, maximum 60 seconds
voiceprint.uploading: Voiceprint information is being uploaded, please wait patiently
voiceprint.tooShort: Voiceprint entry time is too short, please re-record
voiceprint.help: AI only uses your voice as input, even if multiple people are speaking at the same time
